title: German Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing salad made with thinly sliced cucumbers, creamy dressing, and a hint of German flair.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sliced cucumbers and toasted bread.
In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, Dijon mustard, and a pinch of salt.
Pour the dressing over the cucumber mixture and toss to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled and garnish with additional sliced cucumbers if desired.
